'''鈭歯g-ch-w-th''' ('''kangachwethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jacuzzi|jacuzzi]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-ch-w-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jacuzzi|jacuzzi]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-ch-w-th
|-
! Lemma
| kangachwethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingachwethoko|thingachwethoko]] || [[word:jingachwethoko|jingachwethoko]] || [[word:shingachwethoko|shingachwethoko]] || [[word:kingachwethoko|kingachwethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungachwethoko|thuthungachwethoko]] || [[word:jujungachwethoko|jujungachwethoko]] || [[word:shushungachwethoko|shushungachwethoko]] || [[word:kukungachwethoko|kukungachwethoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongachwethoko|thongachwethoko]] || [[word:jongachwethoko|jongachwethoko]] || [[word:shongachwethoko|shongachwethoko]] || [[word:kongachwethoko|kongachwethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongachwethoko|thongachwethoko]] || [[word:jongachwethoko|jongachwethoko]] || [[word:shongachwethoko|shongachwethoko]] || [[word:kongachwethoko|kongachwethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙ngachwethoko|th忙ngachwethoko]] || [[word:j忙ngachwethoko|j忙ngachwethoko]] || [[word:sh忙ngachwethoko|sh忙ngachwethoko]] || [[word:k忙ngachwethoko|k忙ngachwethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathangachwethoko|thathangachwethoko]] || [[word:jajangachwethoko|jajangachwethoko]] || [[word:shashangachwethoko|shashangachwethoko]] || [[word:kakangachwethoko|kakangachwethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangachwethoko|thangachwethoko]] || [[word:jangachwethoko|jangachwethoko]] || [[word:shangachwethoko|shangachwethoko]] || [[word:kangachwethoko|kangachwethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangachwethoko|thangachwethoko]] || [[word:jangachwethoko|jangachwethoko]] || [[word:shangachwethoko|shangachwethoko]] || [[word:kangachwethoko|kangachwethoko]]
|}
